keyPointsSummary: Bird verbs: fly, sing, sit, swim, lay eggs — matched to the specific bird
'national bird' and 'symbol of peace' are fixed descriptive phrases
Astrology terms: horoscope, zodiac sign, moon sign, prediction, fortune
'check/read a horoscope' and 'come true' (for predictions) are common collocations

quickQuiz.hindi: तोता हरे रंग का होता है।
quickQuiz.answer: The parrot is green in colour.
The sparrow is sitting on the roof.

quickQuiz.hindi: मोर भारत का राष्ट्रीय पक्षी है।
quickQuiz.answer: The peacock is India's national bird.

quickQuiz.hindi: कौआ बहुत तेज आवाज करता है।
quickQuiz.answer: The crow makes a very loud sound.
The pigeon is a symbol of peace.
The owl stays awake at night.

quickQuiz.hindi: हंस झील में तैर रहा है।
quickQuiz.answer: The swan is swimming in the lake.

mustRememberRules: Bird verbs: fly, sing, sit, swim, lay eggs — matched to the specific bird
'national bird' and 'symbol of peace' are fixed descriptive phrases
Astrology terms: horoscope, zodiac sign, moon sign, prediction, fortune
'check/read a horoscope' and 'come true' (for predictions) are common collocations
